title: phyllanthus simplex var. gardnerianus
intro: Phyllanthus simplex var. gardnerianus, also known as the Phyllanthus simplex, is a plant species belonging to the Euphorbiaceae family. It is native to Southeast Asia and has been traditionally used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties. The plant is believed to have anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and hepatoprotective properties, which may help in reducing inflammation, scavenging free radicals, and protecting the liver. The leaves of the Phyllanthus simplex var. gardnerianus can be prepared as tea, decoction, or capsule to utilize its health benefits, which include lowering cholesterol levels, reducing blood pressure, and improving liver function.
